description: User selects 'London' from the suggested locations dropdown menu.
frame_description: The homepage with a location search dropdown open showing 'London' and several suggestions.

description: User clicks on the date range input field to open the calendar picker.
frame_description: The search bar on the homepage with the location 'London' already entered.

description: The date picker calendar modal appears on screen.
frame_description: A calendar modal overlaying the homepage, initially showing February and March 2026.

description: User clicks the next month arrow in the date picker to advance the calendar.
frame_description: The calendar modal updating to show April and May 2026.

description: User clicks the next month arrow again to advance the calendar.
frame_description: The calendar modal updating to show May and June 2026.

description: User clicks the next month arrow again to advance the calendar.
frame_description: The calendar modal updating to show June and July 2026.

description: User clicks the next month arrow again to advance the calendar.
frame_description: The calendar modal updating to show August and September 2026.

description: User clicks the next month arrow a final time to reach November 2026.
frame_description: The calendar modal updating to show October and November 2026.

description: User selects November 9th, 2026, as the start date.
frame_description: The calendar modal with November 9th highlighted.

description: User selects November 15th, 2026, as the end date.
frame_description: The calendar modal with the range Nov 9 - Nov 15 highlighted.

description: The date picker modal closes after the date range is confirmed.
frame_description: The homepage search bar now showing the selected date range.

description: User clicks the 'Find your van' button to initiate the search.
The page navigates to the search results for London.
page_title: London - 300+ Caravans, Motorhomes & Campers to hire
frame_description: The browser loading the search results page, showing skeleton loaders initially.

description: The search result cards finish loading and render on the page.
frame_description: The search results page populated with van listing cards.

description: Pricing information appears on the van listing cards.
frame_description: The listing cards now displaying '£/Day' prices.

description: A 'Need a hand?' chat widget pops up in the bottom right corner.
frame_description: The search results page with a chat support bubble visible.

description: User hovers the cursor over the search input area while reviewing results.
frame_description: The cursor lingering near the top search bar on the results page.

description: User clicks on the first search result, the 'Papillon' van listing.
frame_description: The first listing card being clicked.

description: The page navigates to the detailed listing for the 'Papillon' van.
frame_description: The van detail page loading, showing interior photos of the campervan.
